name: Extract terms and generate summary in Iteration Layer

parameters.content:
## Extract Terms and Generate a Simplified Summary

Legal agencies and compliance teams use this pipeline to process vendor or partner terms — extracting key clauses and generating a plain-language summary for non-legal stakeholders.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Extract Terms
Resource: **Document Extraction**

Configure the Document Extraction parameters below, then connect your credentials.

### Step 2: Generate Summary PDF
Resource: **Document Generation**

Configure the Document Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.

parameters.documentJson:
{
  "metadata": { "title": "T&C Summary — {{ $json.document_title }}", "author": "Whitmore Legal Advisors" },
  "page": { "size": { "preset": "A4" }, "margins": { "top_in_pt": 54, "right_in_pt": 54, "bottom_in_pt": 54, "left_in_pt": 54 } },
  "content": [
    { "type": "headline", "level": "h1", "text": "Terms & Conditions Summary" },
    { "type": "headline", "level": "h2", "text": "{{ $json.document_title }}" },
    { "type": "separator" },
    { "type": "headline", "level": "h3", "text": "Termination" },
    { "type": "paragraph", "runs": [{ "text": "{{ $json.termination_clause }}" }] },
    { "type": "headline", "level": "h3", "text": "Liability" },
    { "type": "paragraph", "runs": [{ "text": "{{ $json.liability_limitation }}" }] },
    { "type": "headline", "level": "h3", "text": "Data Handling" },
    { "type": "paragraph", "runs": [{ "text": "{{ $json.data_handling }}" }] },
    { "type": "headline", "level": "h3", "text": "Governing Law" },
    { "type": "paragraph", "runs": [{ "text": "{{ $json.governing_law }}" }] },
    { "type": "separator" },
    { "type": "paragraph", "runs": [{ "text": "Prepared by Whitmore Legal Advisors." }] }
  ]
}
